recommendations.title: Hoodwinked Too! Hood VS. Evil
recommendations.overview: Red Riding Hood is training in the group of Sister Hoods, when she and the Wolf are called to examine the sudden mysterious disappearance of Hansel and Gretel.

recommendations.title: Ben 10: Destroy All Aliens
recommendations.genres: Animation, Science Fiction, Family, Action, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: Based on the original animated series Ben 10.  Ben becomes targeted by an evil Mechamorph Warrior, named "Retaliator," who mistakenly blames Ben for something he did not do and attempts to destroy all aliens.

recommendations.title: The Warrior's Way
recommendations.overview: A warrior-assassin is forced to hide in a small town in the American Badlands after refusing a mission.

recommendations.title: Atlantis: Milo's Return
recommendations.genres: Fantasy, Animation, Science Fiction, Family, Action
recommendations.overview: Milo and Kida reunite with their friends to investigate strange occurances around the world that seem to have links to the secrets of Atlantis.
recommendations.director: Victor Cook, Tad Stones, Toby Shelton

recommendations.title: Tarzan & Jane
recommendations.overview: With the first anniversary of her wedding to Tarzan beckoning, Jane ponders how to make it the perfect English celebration.
recommendations.director: Victor Cook, Don MacKinnon, Steve Loter, Lisa Schaffer

recommendations.title: Scooby-Doo! Stage Fright
recommendations.overview: Join Scooby-Doo, Shaggy and the Mystery Inc. crew as they head to Chicago for Talent Star, a hit talent show in which Fred and Daphne are finalists with some high hopes. Unlucky for them, the competition is frightful as the show is being broadcast fr

recommendations.title: Dead Space: Aftermath
recommendations.overview: The year is 2509 and not only has Earth lost contact with the Ishimura and Isaac Clarke, but now also the USG O'Bannon, the first responder ship sent to rescue them. Four crew members of the O'Bannon have survived. But what happened to the rest of th

recommendations.title: Revenger
recommendations.overview: Hell-bent on avenging the murder of his family, a former detective infiltrates a remote island that serves as a prison for vicious death row criminals.

recommendations.title: Scooby-Doo! Haunted Holidays
recommendations.overview: Scooby-Doo and the gang participate in a toy store's holiday parade where they discover the abandoned haunted clock tower with a troubled past. A sinister snowman haunts the streets and accompanied with a large blizzard, threatens to close down the t

recommendations.title: Batman: Gotham Knight
recommendations.overview: Six interlocking stories reveal Bruce Wayne's earliest adventures as Batman and the steps he took to become the grim avenger of Gotham City.
recommendations.director: Yoshiaki Kawajiri, Toshiyuki Kubooka, Jong-Sik Nam, Yasuhiro Aoki, Futoshi Higashide, Shojiro Nishimi, Hiroshi Morioka
